machines.name: QUICK TURN
machines.tagline: Evolving best-selling high-performance CNC turning centers
machines.description: The QUICK TURN series represents Mazak's most popular CNC turning centers, built with integrated motor spindles and high-rigidity construction for demanding production environments. Available in configurations from 2-axis turning to full Y-axis milling with second spindle, these machines span chuck sizes from 6" to 18" with extensive automation options including the Ez LOADER collaborative robot system.
features: Built-in motor spindles for heavy-duty and high-speed machining
Optional second spindle for continuous first and second process machining
Y-axis milling with extended stroke for complex workpiece applications
NC tailstock and steady rest systems for high-accuracy shaft machining

machines.name: QT-Ez
machines.tagline: Everything you expect from Mazak at an attractive value
machines.description: Designed and built in Florence, KY, the QT-Ez Series delivers high-rigidity construction with integrated spindle designs at an accessible price point. Available with turning, milling, Y-axis, and dual-spindle options across 8", 10", and 12" chuck sizes, these machines feature thermal displacement control and MAZATROL SmoothEz CNC for productive, easy-to-operate machining.
features: High-rigidity construction with built-in motor spindles and roller guides
Thermal displacement control with 0.0001-degree C-axis indexing
MAZATROL SmoothEz CNC with 15" touch screen and QUICK MAZATROL programming
Multi-tasking capability with optional milling, Y-axis, and second spindle

machines.name: QTE
machines.tagline: High-speed, high-accuracy, space-saving CNC turning centers
machines.description: The QTE series delivers compact turning performance with built-in motor spindles for high cutting capacity without maintenance requirements. Supporting milling, Y-axis, and second spindle configurations, these space-efficient machines pair with collaborative robot loaders and gantry systems for flexible production in tight shop floor layouts.
features: Built-in motor spindle with high torque and maintenance-free operation
Selectable 8 or 12-position drum turrets with 25mm tool shank compatibility
Digital setup via MAZATROL SmoothEz CNC for in-office programming
Space-saving automation options including Ez LOADER collaborative robots

machines.name: QT-PRIMOS
machines.tagline: Compact turning for small parts and tight spaces
machines.description: The QT-PRIMOS is a compact, affordable CNC lathe designed for small-part turning. Its minimal footprint makes it ideal for shops with limited floor space, training environments, or as a dedicated cell for small-diameter production.
features: Ultra-compact footprint
Easy-to-use SmoothEz CNC
Affordable entry-level option
Quick setup and changeover

machines.name: SLANT TURN
machines.tagline: Heavy-duty machining of large, long shaft workpieces
machines.description: The SLANT TURN series delivers powerful cutting capabilities for large-diameter workpieces through high-torque spindles generating up to 5,163 ft-lbs and rigid machine construction. With spindle bore options from 7.28" to 14.76" and machining lengths up to 161", these machines handle the most demanding heavy turning applications across energy, oil and gas, and heavy industry sectors.
features: High-torque spindles up to 5,163 ft-lbs for powerful heavy cutting
Wide spindle bore options (Φ7.28" to Φ14.76") for large bar stock
High-rigidity roller guide construction for stable heavy-duty machining
Optional milling capabilities rivaling small machining center performance

machines.name: TURNING CENTER
machines.tagline: Flatbed CNC turning center for heavy-duty large-diameter machining
machines.description: The TURNING CENTER is engineered for high productivity and reliability in demanding turning applications with its double-walled, sand-sealed bed construction providing exceptional vibration absorption and dynamic stiffness. Its high-power spindle with 3-speed hydraulic gear shift delivers full power between 178 and 2,200 RPM, while large spindle bore options up to 7.13" accommodate shaft workpiece machining.
features: High-rigidity sand-sealed double-walled box bed with precision-ground V-shaped slideways
Powerful spindle with 3-speed hydraulic gear shift and full power at 178–2,200 RPM
Large spindle bore options (Φ4.09" standard, Φ7.13" optional) for shaft workpieces
Heavy-duty hydraulic tailstock with 3.94" quill diameter and 14,700 N thrust capacity

machines.name: POWER MASTER
machines.tagline: Flat CNC turning center for ultra heavy cutting
machines.description: The POWER MASTER series delivers the ultimate in heavy-duty turning with a 45 kW (60 HP) spindle generating 5,369 ft-lbs of maximum torque through a 4-stage hydraulic pressure shift. Available in Chucker and Universal configurations with machining diameters up to 39.37" and spindle bore options up to 14.76", these machines tackle the most demanding large-diameter applications.
features: High-torque spindle with 4-stage hydraulic shift generating 5,369 ft-lbs max torque
Octagonal disc turret designed for heavy-duty machining with 3.2s indexing
Wide machine base with reinforced ribs and V-shape slideways for maximum rigidity
MAZATROL SmoothC CNC with conversational programming and auto cutting conditions

machines.name: MULTIPLEX W
machines.tagline: Symmetrical dual-spindle, dual-turret design for continuous machining
machines.description: The MULTIPLEX W series features a symmetrical dual-spindle, dual-turret design that enables continuous two-step machining on a single machine. Automatic workpiece transfer ensures high phase accuracy between OP1 and OP2, while support for turning, drilling, contour milling, and Y-axis machining provides complete part processing in one setup.
features: Symmetrical spindle and turret architecture for balanced productivity
Automatic workpiece transfer for continuous OP1 to OP2 machining
Y-axis capability (W-200Y and W-300Y) for milling flats and off-center drilling
MAZATROL SmoothG CNC with conversational programming and 3D CAD integration

machines.name: DUAL TURN 200
machines.tagline: Two 2-axis CNC turning centers integrated into a single machine
machines.description: The DUAL TURN 200 combines dual spindles and turrets in a symmetrical structure for simultaneous machining on both sides, reducing floor space by 30% compared to two separate machines. Its automatic high-speed workpiece transfer enables continuous OP1 and OP2 processing while an automatic partition system allows independent machining or concurrent loading and unloading.
features: Symmetrical 2-spindle/2-turret structure with equal capacity on both sides
Automatic high-speed workpiece transfer for continuous machining operations
30% reduction in floor space versus two equivalent 2-axis turning centers
Automatic partition system for independent machining or concurrent loading

machines.name: HQR
machines.tagline: 2-turret/2-spindle CNC turning center with milling and Y-axis
machines.description: The HQR is a dual-turret, dual-spindle turning center designed to dramatically reduce cycle times through simultaneous upper and lower turret machining operations. Balanced cutting minimizes workpiece displacement while Y-axis and second spindle capabilities expand machining possibilities, with extensive automation options for extended unattended operation.
features: Simultaneous upper and lower turret machining for reduced cycle time
Balanced cutting that minimizes workpiece displacement during machining
Y-axis and second spindle (W-axis) for expanded machining capability
Extensive automation options including bar feeders and workpiece unloaders

machines.name: HQR NEO
machines.tagline: Twin-spindle, multi-turret production turning
machines.description: The HQR NEO features dual opposing spindles and up to three turrets for simultaneous machining of both ends of a workpiece. Designed for high-volume production, it dramatically reduces cycle times by performing multiple operations simultaneously.
features: Twin opposing spindles
Up to 3 turrets for simultaneous cutting
Automatic part transfer
High-volume production capability

machines.name: QRX 50
machines.tagline: Compact 2-turret CNC turning centers for reduced cycle times
machines.description: The QRX series features dual upper and lower turrets that dramatically reduce cycle time through simultaneous machining, balanced cutting, and left/right simultaneous operations. With a space-saving 78.74" width optimized for bar feeder integration and 12-position drum turrets (24 positions), these compact machines deliver multi-turret productivity in a minimal footprint.
features: Upper and lower turrets for significant cycle time reduction
12-position drum turret (24 positions) with BMT45 standard tool holders
Space-saving 78.74" width optimized for bar feeder integration
MAZATROL SmoothG CNC with virtual machining and synchronized turret operations

machines.name: SYNCREX
machines.tagline: Powers through high-speed production of small, precise parts
machines.description: The SYNCREX series transforms precision small-part productivity with innovative technologies including a 15" touch-panel MAZATROL SmoothSt CNC and High-Damping Composite Casting (HDCC) base that delivers 10% greater rigidity than cast iron with 80% less vibration. Available across six bar sizes from Φ10mm to Φ38mm with 7, 8, and 9-axis configurations plus 5-axis X variants, these machines run full bar with no special preparation required.
features: Full bar capacity with no special bar end preparation required
Preset guide bushing with removable adapter for out-of-machine setup
Exclusive Mazak Auto Tool Setter for reduced setup time
HDCC machine base providing 10% greater rigidity with 80% less vibration

variantGroups.label: Max. machining diameter Φ10 mm to Φ12 mm
Max. machining diameter Φ20 mm to Φ25 mm
Max. machining diameter Φ32 mm to Φ38 mm

machines.name: MEGA TURN
machines.tagline: Vertical CNC turning centers with high-torque, heavy-duty machining capacity
machines.description: The MEGA TURN series features vertical CNC turning centers with a column-traveling design that eliminates machining diameter limitations, offering a large machining area from 19.69" to 64.96" diameter. Combining high-rigidity, high-torque spindles with versatile 12-position drum turrets, these machines enable both turning and secondary milling operations for process integration across aerospace, construction, and energy industries.
features: High-torque spindle performance with up to 2,696 ft-lbs maximum torque (900 series)
12-position drum turret with high-index coupling for stress-free setups
Process integration combining turning and secondary milling operations
Flexible configurations including mirror-image and 2-pallet changer options

machines.name: ORBITEC 20
machines.tagline: True turned surfaces on parts too large or difficult to rotate
machines.description: The ORBITEC 20 provides the unique capability to create true turned surfaces on large, heavy, and awkward workpieces that are difficult or impossible to rotate. Targeted at the energy industry and valve body production, it can complete over 75% of valve applications in a single setup while maintaining high tolerances, with an optional two-pallet changer and PALLETECH system integration.
features: Unique facing/turning headstock design for stationary workpiece machining
60-tool automatic tool changer for complex part processing
Optional two-pallet changer with PALLETECH system integration
Completes 75%+ of valve applications in a single setup

machines.name: VC-Ez
machines.specs: CAT No.40, 12,000 min⁻¹, Made in USA
machines.tagline: Cost-performance vertical made in America
machines.description: Designed and built in Florence, Kentucky, the VC-Ez series delivers stable, reliable part processing with Hybrid MX Roller Guideway Systems on all linear axes and Thermal Shield technology for consistent accuracy. Available across four table sizes with MAZATROL SmoothEz CNC, these machines are optimized for simple operation, fast installation, and long-term reliability.
features: Hybrid MX Roller Guideway Systems on all linear axes for rigidity and speed
Pre-tensioned ball-screw system with end support for positioning accuracy
Thermal Shield technology for consistent thermal stability over long runs
High-speed servo-driven cam ATC with 30-tool standard (50-tool optional)

machines.name: VTC-Ez
machines.tagline: Traveling-column vertical built in Kentucky
machines.description: Designed and built in Kentucky, the VTC-Ez features a fixed table with traveling spindle column for flexible long-workpiece machining and workpiece overhang. Air-cooled spindles minimize thermal growth while the high-speed ATC with servo-driven cam actuation and Thermal Shield compensation deliver consistent accuracy in production environments.
features: Fixed table with traveling spindle column for long workpiece flexibility
Air-cooled spindle minimizes thermal growth and contraction
High-speed ATC with servo-driven cam actuation for fast tool changes
Thermal Shield heat displacement compensation for consistent accuracy

machines.name: VTC
machines.tagline: Fixed-table traveling column for long and multiple workpieces
machines.description: The VTC series features a fixed table and spindle traverse design that enables long workpiece machining, multiple-piece setups, or two-pallet changer type operation in a compact floor space. Liquid-cooled spindles minimize thermal distortion while an optional center partition allows dual-zone independent operation for maximum productivity.
features: Fixed table with traveling column for long workpiece and multi-piece machining
Liquid-cooled spindle minimizes thermal distortion over extended operation
Optional center partition enables dual-zone independent machining
MAZATROL SmoothG CNC with Pocket Milling and VFC cutting optimization

machines.name: MTV
machines.tagline: High-performance vertical with high-torque BT50 spindle
machines.description: The MTV series delivers heavy-duty vertical machining performance through a CAT No.50 high-torque spindle and highly rigid column structure with back-and-forth column and horizontal table travel. Available in five configurations spanning table sizes from 51" to 127", these machines provide wide machining areas with outstanding load capacity for demanding mold, die, and general machining applications.
features: CAT No.50 high-torque spindle for heavy-duty cutting of steel and cast iron
Highly rigid column structure with back-and-forth column travel system
Wide machining area with outstanding table load capacity
Touch panel MAZATROL SmoothG CNC for intuitive programming and operation

machines.name: SVC
machines.specs: Linear Motor X-Axis, CAT No.40, 15,000 min⁻¹
machines.tagline: Linear motor driven ultra-high-speed vertical for long workpieces
machines.description: The SVC series features X-axis linear motor drive delivering rapid traverse of 4,724 IPM even with long strokes, paired with a BT40 high-speed spindle for highly efficient machining of non-ferrous materials. The fixed long table design enables long workpiece machining, multiple workpiece setups, or 2-pallet changer type operation with MAZATROL SmoothG CNC.
features: X-axis linear motor drive with 4,724 IPM rapid traverse for ultra-high-speed feed
BT40 high-speed 22 kW (30 HP) spindle with optional HSK-A63 at 25,000 min⁻¹
Fixed long table for long workpieces, multiple setups, or 2-pallet changer operation
MAZATROL SmoothG CNC with touch screen for intuitive operation

machines.name: UN
machines.tagline: Compact high-speed machining center for large volume production
machines.description: The UN series provides the smallest machine width in its class with ultra-high-speed BT30 spindles accelerating from 0 to 20,000 min⁻¹ in just 0.49 seconds. Designed specifically for high-volume automotive component manufacturing, these compact vertical and horizontal configurations minimize inter-machine spacing while maximizing throughput with Fanuc 32i CNC.
features: Smallest width in class (27.36" vertical / 38.98" horizontal) for dense line layouts
BT30 spindle with 0.49-second acceleration to 20,000 min⁻¹
Designed for ease of maintenance to minimize machine downtime
Fanuc 32i CNC for high-volume production line integration

machines.name: FJV (No.40)
machines.tagline: High-accuracy BT40 double column machining centers
machines.description: The FJV BT40 series delivers high-accuracy machining over extended periods through double column construction with symmetrical headstock design and ball screw core cooling. Supporting high-rigidity cutting to high-speed machining with optional 18,000 and 25,000 min⁻¹ spindle variants, these machines feature Ai Thermal Shield compensation and selectable MAZATROL SmoothG or SmoothC CNC systems.
features: Double column construction for high accuracy over extended operation periods
Ball screw core cooling and symmetrical headstock minimize thermal displacement
Optional high-speed spindle variants at 18,000 and 25,000 min⁻¹
Ai Thermal Shield suppresses cutting position variations from temperature changes

machines.name: FJV (No.50)
machines.tagline: High-accuracy CAT No.50 double column for large workpieces
machines.description: The FJV BT50 series provides high-rigidity double column construction with CAT No.50 integral spindle motor for high-accuracy machining of large workpieces. With table sizes ranging from 68.5" x 29.53" up to 157.48" x 78.74", these machines feature ball screw core cooling, Ai Thermal Shield, and optional 2-pallet changer for multi-surface machining applications.
features: High-rigidity double column construction for large workpiece accuracy
Integral spindle motor eliminates driving gear losses for smooth cutting
Ball screw core cooling and Ai Thermal Shield for thermal stability
Optional high-torque 7,000 min⁻¹ and high-speed BT40 18,000 min⁻¹ spindles

machines.name: FJV 5 Face
machines.tagline: 5-surface double column machining for process integration
machines.description: The FJV 5 Face series combines high-accuracy double column construction with 5-surface machining capability using angle head tooling for efficient process integration on large workpieces. Featuring a built-in motor spindle that eliminates driving gear loss and ball screw core cooling with Ai Thermal Shield, these machines deliver consistent accuracy across the full range of table sizes.
features: 5-surface machining capability with angle head tools for process integration
Double column construction with built-in motor spindle for smooth cutting
Ball screw core cooling and Ai Thermal Shield for thermal stability
MAZATROL SmoothG CNC with touch screen for intuitive programming

machines.name: FJW
machines.tagline: 5-surface double column with W-axis angle head for large workpieces
machines.description: The FJW is a 5-surface double column machining center with capacity for powerful cutting of large workpieces and process integration through a standard angle head attachment with 72-position indexing every 5 degrees. Its BT50 high-torque spindle delivers maximum 828 N-m for rough machining of steel and cast iron, while the W-axis controlled cross rail enables tall workpiece machining capability.
features: Standard angle head attachment with 72-position indexing every 5 degrees
BT50 high-torque spindle with 828 N-m max torque for heavy cutting
W-axis controlled cross rail for tall workpiece machining capability
MAZATROL SmoothG CNC with touch screen for intuitive operation

machines.name: HCN
machines.tagline: Wide spindle variety and high-rigidity for efficient horizontal machining
machines.description: The HCN series is Mazak's best-selling horizontal machining center lineup, offering spindle specifications to meet a wide variety of machining requirements across nine models from 400mm to 1280mm pallet sizes. High-rigidity beds reinforced with strategically located ribs ensure stability, while linear roller guides on all axes and cone coupling pallet clamping deliver repeatable positioning accuracy with advanced factory automation options.
features: High-rigidity bed reinforced with strategically located ribs for stability
Linear roller guides on all X-, Y-, and Z-axes for precision positioning
Cone coupling pallet clamping system for repeatable positioning accuracy
Advanced factory automation with robot interfaces and multi-pallet systems

machines.name: HCN NEO
machines.tagline: Next-generation horizontal for high productivity and reduced environmental impact
machines.description: The HCN NEO series achieves both high productivity and reduced environmental impact through energy-saving components and next-generation construction. Featuring linear roller guides on all axes, NC rotary table as standard, and rapid traverse capability of 2,362 IPM, these machines offer multiple spindle options and automation integration for demanding production environments.
features: Linear roller guides on all axes for precision and durability
NC rotary table included as standard equipment
2,362 IPM rapid traverse across X, Y, Z axes for fast positioning
Energy-saving components for environmental performance and lower operating costs

machines.name: MEGA
machines.tagline: High-power horizontal for difficult-to-cut materials
machines.description: The MEGA 8800 is purpose-built for highly efficient machining of difficult-to-cut materials like Inconel through a high-power 85 kW (113 HP) spindle delivering 1,249 N-m maximum torque at 4,000 min⁻¹. Its unique column and bed structure with dual-level X-axis guide positioning and linear roller guides on all axes provide the rigidity needed for aggressive material removal with a preloaded ball screw core cooling system for thermal stability.
features: 85 kW (113 HP) spindle with 1,249 N-m max torque for difficult-to-cut materials
Unique column and bed structure with dual-level X-axis guide positioning
Linear roller guides on all axes with preloaded ball screw core cooling
Standard 2-pallet changer (6-pallet optional) with up to 348-tool magazine

machines.name: HCN-Q
machines.specs: Quill Axis, CAT No.50, Large Workpieces
machines.tagline: Quill-axis horizontal for large workpiece deep boring
machines.description: The HCN-Q series features a quill spindle with 5.12" diameter core for deep boring of large workpieces, powered by a 45 kW (60 HP) high-output motor delivering 1,849 N-m maximum torque. With pallet sizes from 49.21" to 62.99" and Y-axis twin ball screw design, these machines handle workpieces up to 118.11" diameter with optional attachments for boring, facing, angle, and snout operations.
features: Quill spindle with Φ5.12" core for deep boring of large workpieces
45 kW (60 HP) motor with 1,849 N-m max torque for heavy material removal
Y-axis twin ball screw design for rigidity and positioning accuracy
Multiple attachment options: boring, facing, angle, and snout heads

machines.name: µ
machines.tagline: Ultra-high accuracy horizontal for extended precision operation
machines.description: The mu series delivers ultra-high positioning accuracy of 1/8 of the ISO machining centers inspection standard over extended periods of operation. Featuring advanced thermal management across column, base, ball screw, coolant, and headstock, these machines provide the fastest feed speed and largest axis stroke in their class with Smooth Oscillation Cutting and THERMAL SHIELD compensation technology.
features: Ultra-high positioning accuracy at 1/8 of ISO inspection standard
Advanced thermal management across column, base, ball screw, and headstock
Fastest feed speed and largest axis stroke in class
Smooth Oscillation Cutting and THERMAL SHIELD compensation technology

machines.name: FF
machines.tagline: Space-saving horizontal for mass production line construction
machines.description: The FF series is purpose-built for machining mass-produced parts with high cutting capacity, fast operation, and a space-saving design that facilitates production line construction with just 25.59" inter-machine spacing. Featuring 1.4-second spindle acceleration to 12,000 min⁻¹, 2,441 IPM Z-axis rapid traverse, and 1.5-second 90-degree table positioning, these machines maximize throughput in high-volume manufacturing environments.
features: 1.4-second spindle acceleration to 12,000 min⁻¹ for minimal non-cutting time
Space-saving design with 25.59" inter-machine spacing for line construction
2,441 IPM Z-axis rapid traverse and 1.5-second 90-degree table positioning
High reliability and maintainability for continuous production operation

machines.name: VARIAXIS i NEO
machines.tagline: Versatile 5-axis machining for complex geometries
machines.description: The VARIAXIS i NEO delivers full simultaneous 5-axis machining with a fully supported trunnion table for superior rigidity. Its wide range of spindle and table options allows configuration for everything from aluminum aerospace parts to hardened steel mold work.
features: Full 5-axis simultaneous machining
Fully supported trunnion table
Multiple spindle options
SmoothAi CNC control

machines.name: VARIAXIS C
machines.tagline: Compact 5-axis performance for smaller shops
machines.description: The VARIAXIS C brings full 5-axis capability to shops with limited floor space. Its compact design doesn't compromise on rigidity or accuracy, making it an ideal choice for medical, dental, and precision component manufacturers.
features: Compact footprint
Full 5-axis simultaneous
High-speed spindle options
SmoothEz CNC control

machines.name: VARIAXIS i
machines.tagline: Best-selling 5-axis machining center with tilt table for multi-face and simultaneous machining
machines.description: The VARIAXIS i series is Mazak's best-selling 5-axis platform, offering high-rigidity construction with built-in motor spindles and MAZA-CHECK calibration for long-term accuracy. Available in BIG-PLUS No.40 and No.50 taper configurations with pallet sizes from Φ19.69" to Φ41.34", the lineup includes T-suffix models with integrated turning capability for complete Done-in-One processing from raw material to finished part.
features: Built-in motor spindle with high-rigidity construction for long-term accuracy
MAZA-CHECK automatic 5-axis calibration for consistent precision
T-suffix models add turning capability for complete mill-turn processing
Fully supported trunnion table design for superior rigidity during heavy cutting

variantGroups.label: Tool shank (standard): CAT No.40 / CAT No.50 with turning

machines.name: VARIAXIS j
machines.tagline: Entry-level 5-axis with rigid trunnion table for multi-surface machining
machines.description: The VARIAXIS j series provides an accessible entry point into 5-axis machining with a rigid trunnion table supporting 0.0001-degree indexing for precise multi-surface work. The j-500 delivers 4-axis simultaneous control with A-axis indexing, while the j-500/5X upgrades to full simultaneous 5-axis contouring with MAZATROL SmoothAi CNC for complex curved surface machining.
features: Rigid trunnion table with 0.0001-degree indexing for precise multi-surface machining
Full simultaneous 5-axis control available on the j-500/5X variant
Compact footprint ideal for shops adding 5-axis capability
Ai Thermal Shield compensation for consistent accuracy over extended operation

machines.name: VC-Ez X
machines.specs: Tilt Table, CAT No.40, Made in USA
machines.tagline: Cost-performance tilt-table 5-axis designed and built in Kentucky
machines.description: Designed and built in Florence, Kentucky, the VC-Ez X series brings accessible 5-axis machining with a roller gear trunnion table for accurate tilt-table positioning. Featuring Hybrid MX Roller Guideway Systems on all linear axes, Thermal Shield technology, and MAZATROL SmoothEz5 CNC with a 15-inch touchscreen, these machines deliver stable, repeatable 5-axis processing at an attractive value.
features: Roller gear trunnion table for accurate 5-axis tilt-table machining
Hybrid MX Roller Guideway Systems on all linear axes for rigidity and speed
Thermal Shield technology for consistent accuracy over long production runs
MAZATROL SmoothEz5 CNC with 15-inch touchscreen for simple operation

machines.name: VORTEX i-V
machines.tagline: Tilt-spindle 5-axis for large vertical work
machines.description: The VORTEX i-V uses a tilt-spindle design rather than a tilting table, enabling 5-axis machining of large, heavy workpieces. Its vertical configuration is perfect for aerospace structural components, large molds, and energy sector parts.
features: Tilt-spindle B-axis design
Large table for heavy workpieces
High-torque spindle options
SmoothAi CNC control

machines.name: VORTEX e-V
machines.specs: Double Column, Tilt Spindle, CAT No.50
machines.tagline: Double-column tilt-spindle 5-axis for large vertical workpieces
machines.description: The VORTEX e-V series features double-column construction with a tilt-spindle B-axis and direct-drive C-axis motor for high-accuracy 5-axis machining of large workpieces. Available in 1250 and 1600 sizes with 2-pallet changer or single-pallet configurations, these machines handle workpieces up to Φ90.55" in diameter with standard CAT No.50 tooling and MAZATROL SmoothAi CNC.
features: Double-column structure for stable, high-accuracy 5-axis machining
Direct-drive C-axis motor for high-torque, high-speed table positioning
2-pallet changer or single-pallet configurations for flexible production
Tilt-spindle B-axis design enables machining of large, heavy workpieces

machines.name: VTC
machines.specs: Fixed Table, Tilt Spindle, CAT No.40/50
machines.tagline: Fixed-table tilt-spindle 5-axis for long and complex workpieces
machines.description: The VTC 5-Axis series combines a fixed table with a tilt-spindle B-axis (±110 degrees) for simultaneous 5-axis machining of long workpieces. The VTC-800/30SR offers high-speed CAT No.40 machining, the HD variant provides heavy-duty CAT No.50 cutting power, and the SD model features dual synchronized rotary tables purpose-built for long aerospace components.
features: ±110-degree B-axis swiveling head for complex contour machining
Fixed table design enables long workpiece and multi-piece setups
Optional NC rotary table and center partition for flexible configurations
Dual synchronized rotary table option (SD) for long aerospace components

machines.name: VORTEX II
machines.specs: A/B-Axis Tilt Spindle, CAT No.50, Aerospace
machines.tagline: Large-format A/B-axis tilt-spindle 5-axis for aerospace structural components
machines.description: The VORTEX II series delivers stable, high-accuracy simultaneous 5-axis machining of large aerospace components through A-axis and B-axis spindle rotation with ±40-degree travel and backlash-free roller gear cam positioning. Available in 815/120 and 1400/160 sizes with column-feed or double-column construction, these machines provide large table capacities with optional high-speed 18,000 min⁻¹ and high-torque spindle configurations.
features: A-axis and B-axis spindle with ±40-degree rotary range for complex contours
Backlash-free roller gear cam for precise spindle positioning
Column-feed and double-column construction for maximum rigidity
Optional high-speed (18,000 min⁻¹) and high-torque spindle configurations

machines.name: VORTEX HORIZONTAL PROFILER
machines.tagline: High-speed horizontal 5-axis profiler for large aerospace aluminum structures
machines.description: The VORTEX HORIZONTAL PROFILER delivers ultra-high-speed simultaneous 5-axis machining of large aerospace aluminum structural components with spindle speeds from 26,000 to 30,000 min⁻¹. Box construction integrating the base, column, and table provides exceptional rigidity, while a thermally symmetrical spindle and column design with 90-degree table tilt system enables complex profiling with standard 1.5 MPa through-spindle coolant.
features: Ultra-high-speed spindles from 26,000 to 30,000 min⁻¹ for aluminum profiling
Box construction integrating base, column, and table for maximum rigidity
Thermally symmetrical spindle and column design for consistent accuracy
90-degree table tilt system with high-pressure through-spindle coolant (1.5 MPa)

machines.name: HCR
machines.tagline: Horizontal 5-axis with tilting rotary table for superior chip evacuation
machines.description: The HCR series delivers simultaneous 5-axis horizontal machining with a unique tilting rotary table, high-speed axial acceleration, and an 800-liter large-capacity coolant system for superior chip evacuation. The HCR-5000 features a 2-pallet changer while the HCR-5000S provides single-pallet operation with MPP (Multi Pallet Pool) expandability for 6, 12, or 18-pallet automated storage.
features: Unique tilting rotary table with roller gear cam for precise positioning
High-speed axial acceleration for reduced non-cutting time
800-liter large-capacity coolant system for superior chip evacuation
MPP expandable automation with 6, 12, or 18-pallet storage options

machines.name: UD
machines.tagline: Ultra-precision 5-axis for die, mold, and high-accuracy component machining
machines.description: The UD-400/5X delivers ultra-high-accuracy 5-axis machining for die/mold and precision components through a fully symmetrical double-column structure with mineral cast base for maximum vibration damping. Its HSK-E40 high-speed spindle reaches 45,000 min⁻¹ with core cooling, while direct-drive motors on B and C rotary axes and high-accuracy scale feedback on all five axes ensure nanometer-level precision with MAZACHECK 5-axis calibration.
features: Fully symmetrical double-column structure with mineral cast base for vibration damping
HSK-E40 spindle at 45,000 min⁻¹ with core cooling for die/mold finishing
Direct-drive motors on B and C axes with high-accuracy scale feedback on all 5 axes
MAZACHECK 5-axis automatic calibration and THERMAL SHIELD compensation

machines.name: VERSATECH
machines.specs: CAT No.50, Universal Head, Large Format
machines.tagline: Large double-column 5-axis with universal spindle head for massive workpieces
machines.description: The VERSATECH series features large double-column construction with a specialized universal spindle head that enables accurate multi-surface and 5-axis machining without head changers. Available in V-100N and V-140N column widths with table lengths from 118" to 394", these machines handle the largest aerospace, energy, and die/mold workpieces with CAT No.50 tooling, optional turning tables, and PALLETECH automated pallet transfer integration.
features: Specialized universal head for 5-axis machining without head changers
Large double-column construction for maximum rigidity on massive workpieces
Optional turning table (Φ116.14") for mill-turn process integration
PALLETECH automated pallet transfer system compatibility

machines.name: INTEGREX i NEO
machines.tagline: The benchmark in multi-tasking performance
machines.description: The INTEGREX i NEO series combines full 5-axis milling and turning capabilities in a single setup, reducing cycle times and improving accuracy. Equipped with Mazak's latest SmoothAi CNC, it delivers intelligent machining with thermal compensation and vibration suppression.
features: Done-in-one machining
SmoothAi CNC control
Thermal Shield construction
Automatic tool changer (up to 120 tools)

machines.name: INTEGREX i-500
machines.tagline: Large-capacity multi-tasking for demanding applications
machines.description: The INTEGREX i-500 is designed for large, complex workpieces that require full turning, milling, and 5-axis contouring in a single setup. Its robust construction and large machining envelope make it ideal for aerospace, energy, and heavy industry components.
features: Large machining envelope
Full 5-axis simultaneous machining
High-rigidity construction
SmoothAi CNC control

machines.name: INTEGREX j-200 NEO
machines.tagline: Eco-friendly multi-tasking for the modern shop
machines.description: The INTEGREX j-200 NEO delivers done-in-one machining in a compact, energy-efficient package. Its smaller footprint and lower power consumption make it an excellent entry point into multi-tasking, without sacrificing capability or precision.
features: Compact footprint
Energy-efficient design
Full C-axis contouring
SmoothEz CNC control

machines.name: INTEGREX i-H
machines.tagline: Horizontal multi-tasking with flat front design for seamless automation integration
machines.description: The INTEGREX i-H series features a flat front machine body design optimized for convenient automation integration including bar feeders, Ez LOADER collaborative robots, and Auto Jaw Changer systems. Available in 6", 8", 10", and 12" chuck sizes with second spindle, lower turret, and simultaneous 5-axis ST configurations, these machines deliver full multi-tasking capability with Ai Thermal Shield compensation and MAZATROL SmoothAi CNC.
features: Flat front machine body design for seamless automation integration
Available in H, S, and ST configurations with second spindle and lower turret
Simultaneous 5-axis control on ST models for complex part geometries
Ai Thermal Shield compensation and SmoothAi CNC with digital twin capabilities

machines.name: INTEGREX i-150
machines.tagline: Ultra-compact multi-tasking in a class-leading small footprint
machines.description: The INTEGREX i-150 delivers full multi-tasking capability in an ultra-compact 5.8 m² footprint, 24% smaller than comparable 6-inch chuck machines. Featuring a backlash-free roller gear cam B-axis with 0.0001-degree indexing, long Y-axis stroke of ±3.94", and work handling system with tailstock for continuous OP1/OP2 machining, this machine brings Done-in-One processing to space-constrained shops.
features: Ultra-compact 5.8 m² footprint — 24% smaller than comparable 6" chuck machines
Backlash-free roller gear cam B-axis with 0.0001-degree indexing increments
Long Y-axis stroke of ±3.94" for complex off-center features
Work handling system with tailstock for continuous OP1/OP2 machining

machines.name: INTEGREX j
machines.tagline: Entry-level multi-tasking with B-axis indexing milling spindle
machines.description: The INTEGREX j series provides an accessible entry point into multi-tasking with a B-axis milling spindle indexed in 5-degree increments from -30 to 190 degrees using a high-precision index coupling. Available in 8", 10", and 12" chuck sizes with optional second spindle (S models), these machines bridge the gap between turret lathes and full 5-axis multi-tasking with Ai Thermal Shield compensation and up to 72-tool magazine capacity.
features: B-axis milling spindle indexed in 5-degree increments with high-precision coupling
Optional second spindle (S models) for continuous OP1/OP2 machining
Front-positioned tool magazine for fast tool changes and easy maintenance
Ai Thermal Shield compensation for consistent accuracy over long runs

machines.name: INTEGREX e-H
machines.tagline: Large-capacity horizontal multi-tasking for heavy workpieces
machines.description: The INTEGREX e-H series delivers multi-tasking capability for large, heavy workpieces through an orthogonal design providing a large operation area with high-accuracy machining. Available in e-500H, e-670H, and e-800H sizes with chuck options from 15" to 50" and optional second spindle (S variants), these machines feature built-in motor spindles with temperature control, long boring bar storage, and MAZATROL SmoothAi CNC.
features: Orthogonal design providing large operation area for heavy workpieces
Built-in motor spindle with temperature control for thermal stability
Dedicated long boring bar storage for deep-hole machining operations
Reduces processes by one-eighth and lead times by one-fifth versus conventional methods

machines.name: INTEGREX AG
machines.tagline: Hybrid multi-tasking with integrated gear skiving, hobbing, and measurement
machines.description: The INTEGREX AG series integrates gear cutting capabilities including skiving, hobbing, and endmilling directly into a multi-tasking platform, eliminating the need for dedicated gear machines. Available across the full INTEGREX i NEO, i-H, i-500, and vertical/e-V platforms with chuck sizes from 8" to 12" (horizontal) and table sizes up to Φ55.12" (vertical), these machines feature integrated gear measurement for complete Done-in-One gear production.
features: Integrated gear skiving, hobbing, and endmilling in a single machine
Built-in gear measurement eliminates need for separate inspection equipment
Available across horizontal, vertical, and large-capacity INTEGREX platforms
MAZATROL SmoothAi CNC with dedicated gear cutting programming support

specifications.Gear Accuracy: ISO Class 7 (hobbing) / ISO Class 5 (endmilling with correction)

variantGroups.label: Max. machining diameter Φ41.34" to Φ49.21"
Max. machining diameter Φ57.09" to Φ90.55"

machines.name: INTEGREX i-V
machines.tagline: Vertical multi-tasking combining turning and 5-axis milling in one machine
machines.description: The INTEGREX i-V series performs free-form surface machining by 5-axis control, multi-surface machining, and turning on a single vertical platform. Available in 500, 630, and 800 sizes with 2-pallet changer or single-pallet configurations, these machines feature B-axis roller gear cam positioning, linear roller guides on all axes, and MAZATROL SmoothAi CNC with Smooth Ai spindle optimization.
features: Combined turning and 5-axis milling on a single vertical platform
B-axis roller gear cam for precise, backlash-free positioning
2-pallet changer or single-pallet configurations for flexible production
MAZA-CHECK 5-axis calibration for consistent accuracy over time

variantGroups.label: Max. workpiece size: Φ41.34" to Φ49.21"
Max. workpiece size: Φ59.06" to Φ66.93"

machines.name: INTEGREX e-V
machines.specs: Double Column, CAT No.50, Large Capacity
machines.tagline: Vertical double-column multi-tasking for the largest workpieces
machines.description: The INTEGREX e-V series delivers multi-surface machining, free-form surface machining by 5-axis control, and turning through a double-column construction providing exceptional rigidity for the largest workpieces. Available in 1250, 1600, and 1850 sizes with direct-drive table motors for high-torque positioning, these machines handle workpieces up to Φ137.8" in diameter with MAZATROL SmoothAi CNC.
features: Double-column construction for maximum rigidity on large workpieces
Direct-drive table motor for high-torque, high-speed positioning
Combined 5-axis milling and turning capability in a single vertical platform
Two-gear range table option for heavy workpiece machining on larger models

variantGroups.label: Max. workpiece size: Φ57.09" to Φ59.06"
Max. workpiece size: Φ80.71" to Φ90.55"
Max. workpiece size: Φ92.52" to Φ137.8"

machines.name: INTEGREX e-RAMTEC
machines.specs: Ram Spindle, CAT No.50, Large Capacity
machines.tagline: Ram spindle vertical multi-tasking for deep boring and large-part machining
machines.description: The INTEGREX e-RAMTEC series combines double-column construction with a dedicated ram spindle for deep inner diameter boring and milling of large workpieces, complementing the standard cross-rail milling spindle. Available in V/8, V/10, and V/12 sizes handling workpieces up to Φ92.52", these machines feature a dedicated 40-tool ram spindle magazine with optional TOOL HIVE expandable to 180+ tools, B-axis roller gear cam positioning, and high-accuracy C-axis to 0.0001-degree increments.
features: Dedicated ram spindle for deep inner diameter boring and milling operations
Double-column construction with 40-tool ram spindle magazine (180+ with TOOL HIVE)
B-axis indexed positioning with roller gear cam and 150-degree travel range
High-accuracy C-axis positioning to 0.0001-degree increments

machines.name: OPTIPLEX NEO
machines.tagline: Versatile fiber laser for thin and thick material
machines.description: The OPTIPLEX NEO is Mazak's most versatile 2D fiber laser, available in power options from 4 kW to 20 kW. It excels at high-speed cutting of thin sheet and high-quality cutting of thick plate, making it the go-to machine for shops that process a wide range of material types and thicknesses.
features: Wide power range (4-20 kW)
High-speed thin sheet cutting
Thick plate quality cutting
Multiple table size options

machines.name: OPTIPLEX HP
machines.tagline: Maximum power for the thickest material
machines.description: The OPTIPLEX HP delivers up to 30 kW of fiber laser power for high-quality cutting of the thickest plate material. When your production demands maximum cutting speed and the ability to process thick mild steel, stainless, and aluminum, the HP is the answer.
features: Up to 30 kW laser power
High-quality thick plate cutting
High-speed processing
Large format cutting area

machines.name: OPTIPLEX Ez
machines.tagline: Cost-effective fiber laser for everyday cutting
machines.description: The OPTIPLEX Ez delivers reliable fiber laser cutting performance at an accessible price point. Available in 4 kW and 6 kW configurations, it's an ideal entry point for shops transitioning from CO2 to fiber laser technology or adding laser cutting capacity.
features: Cost-performance fiber laser
4 kW and 6 kW options
Easy operation
Multiple table size options

machines.name: OPTIPLEX 4020 BEVEL
machines.tagline: Integrated 2D and bevel cutting in one machine
machines.description: The OPTIPLEX BEVEL integrates 2D flat cutting and bevel cutting into a single machine, eliminating the need for separate equipment. Capable of V, Y, X, and K-type bevel cuts at angles up to 45 degrees, it reduces material handling and setup time while improving positioning accuracy for welding and assembly.
features: V, Y, X, and K-type bevel cutting up to ±45°
20 kW fiber laser oscillator
SmoothBEVEL CNC with integrated CAD/CAM
Fully enclosed cutting area for safety and cleanliness

machines.name: STX
machines.tagline: Compact table-feed laser for space-efficient cutting
machines.description: The STX is a compact, space-efficient 2D fiber laser that uses a table feed mechanism requiring less than half the floor space of traditional flying optics machines. With Beam Diameter Control technology and intelligent setup functions that reduce configuration from 60 minutes to just one minute, it delivers smart laser cutting for thin to medium-thickness material.
features: Table feed system for minimal footprint
Beam Diameter Control for optimized cutting
Intelligent setup reduces config time to ~1 minute
Expandable to Flexible Mazak Laser FMS (up to 4 machines)

machines.name: FG-400 NEO
machines.tagline: 3D laser for large pipes and structural material
machines.description: The FG-400 NEO is a 3D fiber laser designed for cutting long pipes and structural material up to 406mm (16") round and 305mm (12") square. With workpiece lengths up to 15m, it handles the large structural components used in construction, infrastructure, and heavy fabrication.
features: Large pipe capacity (Φ16")
Workpiece length up to 15m
Round and square profiles
4 kW fiber laser

machines.name: FG-220
machines.tagline: 3D laser for long pipes and structural materials
machines.description: The FG-220 performs continuous automatic machining of long pipes and structural materials with a 3D laser head that cuts complex shapes from any angle. Four synchronized chucks prevent material distortion during cutting, and a fiber laser enables energy-efficient processing of steel, aluminum, copper, and brass.
features: 3D laser head for multi-angle cutting
L, H, I-beam, channel, round, and square profiles
Four synchronized chucks prevent distortion
Optional tapping unit up to M12 threads

machines.name: FT-150 NEO
machines.tagline: High-speed tube and pipe laser cutting
machines.description: The FT-150 NEO is a high-speed tube and pipe fiber laser optimized for fast processing of smaller diameter material up to 152mm (6") round. Its high-speed cutting capability and compact design make it ideal for high-volume tube fabrication in furniture, automotive, and architectural applications.
features: High-speed tube cutting
Compact footprint
Round and square profiles
3 kW fiber laser

machines.name: FT-250

machines.description: The FT-250 steps up to 6 kW laser power and larger tube capacity up to 254mm (10") round, handling a wider range of tube and structural profiles at production speeds. Multiple length options accommodate both standard and oversized material.

machines.name: VARIAXIS i-300 AWC
machines.tagline: Compact 5-axis with Auto Work Changer
machines.description: A compact simultaneous 5-axis vertical machining center with Auto Work Changer enabling continuous unmanned machining with selectable work stocker positions.
features: Compact workpiece stocker and tool magazine enabling continuous machining
Standard Smooth AWC software for Auto Work Changer management
High-speed and high-precision machining of complex components
Selectable work stocker (32 or 40 positions)
Multiple drum tool magazine with automatic supply system
A- and C-axis indexing at 0.0001° increments

machines.name: VC-500A/5X AM HWD
machines.tagline: Hybrid multi-tasking with additive manufacturing
machines.description: The VC-500A/5X AM HWD combines additive and subtractive manufacturing in a single 5-axis machine. Hot Wire Deposition deposits 3-4 lbs/hour with 98% material utilization, while the 5-axis milling capability finishes parts to final specification — all in one setup. Ideal for near net shape manufacturing, cladding with dissimilar metals, and repair of worn or chipped components.
features: Hot Wire Deposition: 3-4 lbs/hour, 98% material utilization
5-axis rotary/tilt trunnion table with roller gear cam
MAZATROL SmoothX CNC with EIA/ISO and conversational programming
30 or 60-tool magazine options
Compact footprint with integrated chip conveyor and mist collector

machines.name: FSW-460V
machines.tagline: Ultra high-speed friction stir welding
machines.description: The FSW-460V is an ultra high-speed friction stir welding machine that joins materials without melting, shielding gas, or filler wire. A rotating tool with a profiled pin is plunged into the joint area, generating frictional heat that softens materials and creates solid-state welds. With 14 kN thrust force, 10,000 rpm spindle, and fully automated CNC-controlled clamping, it welds aluminum, steel, and nickel-based alloys with zero waste or toxic fumes.
features: 14 kN max thrust force with 10,000 rpm spindle
PCD (polycrystalline diamond) welding tools
Fully automated CNC-controlled part clamping
SmoothG CNC auto-adjusts tool position for constant thrust force
BIG-PLUS BBT-40 spindle taper with 15-position tool storage

categories.label: Turning
categories.description: High-speed, high-precision CNC turning for production efficiency.
categories.longDescription: Mazak turning centers deliver the spindle power, rigidity, and precision your production demands. From compact 2-axis lathes to full Y-axis milling configurations with dual spindles and turrets, our turning lineup covers every application from small-batch prototyping to high-volume production.

subGroups.label: CNC turning centers with multiple spindles & multiple turrets
Facing & Turning Head Type Machining Center

categories.label: Swiss
categories.description: Swiss-type production turning for small, precise parts at high volume.
categories.longDescription: The SYNCREX series brings Mazak engineering to the Swiss-type market. Purpose-built for high-volume production of small, complex parts, these machines combine sliding headstock precision with Mazak's MAZATROL SmoothSt CNC for intuitive programming and fast setups.

categories.label: Vertical Turning
categories.description: Heavy-duty vertical turning for large-diameter, heavy workpieces.
categories.longDescription: Mazak vertical turning centers are engineered for large, heavy workpieces that demand stability and power. The inverted spindle design uses gravity to your advantage, providing superior chip evacuation and workholding for aerospace, energy, and heavy industry applications.

categories.label: Vertical
categories.description: Rigid vertical machining centers for mold, die, and general machining.
categories.longDescription: Mazak vertical machining centers combine rigid construction with high-speed spindles for everything from general-purpose machining to precision mold and die work. From compact BT30 production machines to massive double column centers with 157" tables, the lineup covers every vertical application with options for traveling columns, linear motor drives, and 5-face machining.

categories.label: Horizontal
categories.description: High-volume horizontal machining with pallet changers and automation.
categories.longDescription: Mazak horizontal machining centers are built for production. With standard pallet changers, tombstone fixturing capability, and automation-ready designs, these machines maximize spindle utilization and minimize non-cutting time for high-volume operations across pallet sizes from 400mm to 1600mm.

categories.label: 5-Axis
categories.description: Simultaneous 5-axis contouring for the most complex geometries.
categories.longDescription: The VARIAXIS and VORTEX series deliver full simultaneous 5-axis machining for the most demanding applications in aerospace, medical, and precision manufacturing. Reduce setups, improve accuracy, and machine complex contoured surfaces in a single clamping.

categories.label: Multi-Tasking
categories.description: Turn, mill, and drill in a single setup — eliminate multiple operations.
categories.longDescription: The INTEGREX series pioneered Done-in-One manufacturing. These multi-tasking machines combine full turning, milling, 5-axis contouring, and optional gear cutting in a single machine — dramatically reducing lead times, floor space, and work-in-process inventory.

subGroups.label: Gear machining integrated with multi-tasking machines

categories.label: 2D Laser
categories.description: Fiber laser flat sheet cutting from thin gauge to thick plate.
categories.longDescription: The OPTIPLEX series delivers high-speed fiber laser cutting for flat sheet processing. From thin gauge stainless to thick mild steel plate, these machines combine Mazak's beam control technology with automation options for continuous, unattended operation.

categories.label: 3D Laser
categories.description: Tube, pipe, and structural profile laser cutting at production speeds.
categories.longDescription: Mazak 3D laser processing machines cut tubes, pipes, structural profiles, and 3D formed parts with precision and speed. Purpose-built for fabricators who need to process complex geometries that traditional flat-bed lasers cannot handle.

categories.label: Tube & Pipe Laser
categories.description: High-speed tube, pipe, and structural profile laser cutting.
categories.longDescription: Mazak tube and pipe laser processing machines deliver high-speed, precision cutting of tubes, pipes, and structural profiles. From compact high-volume tube cutting to large-diameter structural material processing, these machines handle a wide range of fabrication demands.

categories.label: Additive Manufacturing
categories.description: Hybrid additive/subtractive manufacturing combining metal deposition with 5-axis machining.
categories.longDescription: Mazak Additive Manufacturing machines combine metal deposition technology with full 5-axis machining capability in a single setup. Using Hot Wire Deposition or Laser Metal Deposition, these hybrid machines enable near net shape manufacturing, cladding with dissimilar metals, and repair of worn or chipped parts — then finish to final specification without re-fixturing.

categories.label: Friction Stir Welding
categories.description: Solid-state joining of aluminum, steel, and dissimilar metals without melting or filler wire.
categories.longDescription: Mazak MegaStir Friction Stir Welding machines join materials using a rotating tool that generates frictional heat to soften — not melt — metals along the joint line. With over 20 years of FSW expertise, these machines weld aluminum, steel, nickel-based alloys, and dissimilar metals with zero waste, no shielding gas, and no toxic fumes. Combined with Mazak's DONE IN ONE processing, FSW enables raw-to-finished-part manufacturing in a single setup.
